title: Classic Portuguese Paella
description: A traditional Portuguese dish made with rice, seafood, and spices. This recipe is a simplified version of the classic Spanish paella.

ingredients.name: Sour (such as cherry or red wine vinegar)
Seafood mix (such as mussels, clams, and squid)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the seafood mix and cook until the seafood is lightly browned.
Add the shrimp and cook for 1-2 minutes, until pink.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the Portuguese rice and stir to coat with the oil and spice mixture.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges and chopped fresh herbs if desired.
